languages.text: "Ничего удивительного, Ферренц. Ты пытаешься отрезать этому несчастному ноги".
"It's hardly surprising, Ferrenz. You're trying to cut off the poor man's legs."
languages.original_text: "Ничего удивительного, Ферренц. Ты пытаешься отрезать этому несчастному ноги".

traits.locale_text: "It's hardly surprising, Ferrenz. You're trying to cut off the poor man's legs."
"It's hardly surprising, Ferrenz. You're trying to cut off the poor man's legs — the only ones he has."
"It's hardly surprising, Ferrenz. You're trying to cut off the poor man's legs — the only ones he has."
"It's hardly surprising, Ferrenz. You're trying to cut off the poor man's legs."

languages.text: 「それは驚くことではありませんよ、フェレンツ。あなたはその貧しい男の足を切り落とそうとしているのです。彼には足しかないのです。」
languages.original_text: "It's hardly surprising, Ferrenz. You're trying to cut off the poor man's legs — the only ones he has."

traits.locale_text: 「それは驚くことではありませんよ、フェレンツ。あなたはその貧しい男の足を切り落とそうとしているのです。彼には足しかないのです。」

languages.text: "Buna şaşırmamak gerek Ferrenz. Zavallı adamın bacaklarını kesmeye çalışıyorsun."
languages.original_text: "It's hardly surprising, Ferrenz. You're trying to cut off the poor man's legs."

traits.locale_text: "Buna şaşırmamak gerek Ferrenz. Zavallı adamın bacaklarını kesmeye çalışıyorsun."

languages.text: «No es ninguna sorpresa, Ferrenz. Está intentando cortarle las piernas al pobre hombre».
languages.original_text: "It's hardly surprising, Ferrenz. You're trying to cut off the poor man's legs."

traits.locale_text: «No es ninguna sorpresa, Ferrenz. Está intentando cortarle las piernas al pobre hombre».

languages.text: “这很正常，费伦茨。毕竟你想切掉这个可怜人的腿。”
languages.original_text: "It's hardly surprising, Ferrenz. You're trying to cut off the poor man's legs."

traits.locale_text: “这很正常，费伦茨。毕竟你想切掉这个可怜人的腿。”

languages.text: « Ça n'a rien de surprenant, Ferrenz. Vous voulez couper les jambes de ce pauvre homme. »
languages.original_text: "It's hardly surprising, Ferrenz. You're trying to cut off the poor man's legs."

traits.locale_text: « Ça n'a rien de surprenant, Ferrenz. Vous voulez couper les jambes de ce pauvre homme. »

languages.text: "Das überrascht mich nicht, Ferrenz. "Ihr versucht, dem armen Mann die Beine abzuschneiden."
languages.original_text: "It's hardly surprising, Ferrenz. You're trying to cut off the poor man's legs."

traits.locale_text: "Das überrascht mich nicht, Ferrenz. "Ihr versucht, dem armen Mann die Beine abzuschneiden."
